# meok-agents-md-lint-mcp

> MEOK AGENTS.md Linter MCP — validates the cross-vendor coding-agent spec (Cursor / Claude Code / Cline / Windsurf / Aider / OpenAI Codex) stewarded by AAIF. Security smells + consistency lint + passing templates. By MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- lint_agents_md
- check_required_sections
- check_security_smells
- check_consistency
- list_spec_sections
- generate_passing_template

## Install
```
pip install meok-agents-md-lint-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/meok-agents-md-lint-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
